SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-17-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-17-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF EDDIE LYNN FARRIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ JASMINE IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-17-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FARRIS, EDDIE LYNN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JASMINE, FERNANDEZ JOHN STEWART MANAGEMENT COMPANY $4,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
